prerequisites: A Weatherstack account. Sign up at weatherstack.com/signup to provision an account and obtain an API access key.
Your API access key from the Weatherstack dashboard, supplied as the `access_key` field.
A location for the `query` field. Weatherstack accepts a location name, ZIP/postal code, latitude/longitude pair, or IP address.
A date for the `historical_date` field in `YYYY-MM-DD` format. Access to the historical weather endpoint depends on your Weatherstack subscription plan.

authMethods.name: API access key
authMethods.summary: Weatherstack authenticates every request with an API access key passed via the `access_key` parameter against the base URL api.weatherstack.com. Create a Weatherstack account to obtain the key, then provide it in the connector's `access_key` field.

setupSteps.title: Create a Weatherstack account
setupSteps.body: Sign up at weatherstack.com/signup. After registration, your API access key is available from the Weatherstack account dashboard.

setupSteps.title: Provide the access key
setupSteps.body: Copy the API access key from the dashboard into the connector's `access_key` field. Weatherstack passes this value as the `access_key` request parameter to authenticate calls to api.weatherstack.com.

setupSteps.title: Set the location query
setupSteps.body: Set the `query` field to the location you want weather data for. Weatherstack accepts a location name, ZIP/postal code, latitude and longitude coordinates, or an IP address.

setupSteps.title: Set the historical date
setupSteps.body: Set the `historical_date` field to the date you want to retrieve, in `YYYY-MM-DD` format. This drives the Weatherstack historical weather endpoint; availability of historical data depends on your subscription plan.
